title: Vue.js Components Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of component definition, registration, and passing data via props.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primary role of a component in Vue.js?
options: To fetch data from a database.
To divide the User Interface into independent, reusable pieces.
To provide a replacement for CSS styles.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.

questions.question: Which option is used to define custom attributes on a component for passing data down from a parent?
Can a Vue component have its own internal 'data' function and 'methods'?
options: Yes, it is its own isolated scope.
No, it must use the parent's data.

questions.question: To use a component, which and/or what method should you use on the app instance to register it?
Vue components can be nested within each other to form a complex UI tree.
